program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Define acceptance gates for validation command matrix evidence, including H00 command id subset checks and executed command mapping.
claude_questions: Does validation_command_matrix_acceptance_gate_definition bind to RP00.P00.M07.S02 and define acceptance gates only, without claiming all M07 completion?

Does it require command rows, package scripts, no-write validation, command evidence exit_code 0, H00 command id subset checks, executed H00 command mapping, generation command exclusion, no-real-data attestation, actual Claude CLI metadata, and construction inspection?

Does scripts/validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs now enforce command-evidence hermes_gate.command_ids as a subset of H00 validation_command_ids and map each id to an executed exit_code 0 command?
Does it preserve H00 Hermes evidence, C00 Claude review, human approval boundaries, no-real-data, and next boundary RP00.P00.M07.S03?
Does it avoid production mutation, generation output approval, real-data import, and RP00 completion claims?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
